subcodes.first_line: O thou my Greatest Branch! Thy letter was surely presented before this oppressed one, and I heard that which
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غصنی الاعظم قد حضر لدی المظلوم کتابک و سمعنا ما ناجیت به الله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
